_comment: SCENARIO A — Weekly Competitive Intelligence Digest.
1. Triggers (cron Mon 08:00 CET / manual webhook) -> Config (Set node holding all secrets) -> Set Run config (run_id, week_of) -> Split competitors -> Loop.
2. Per-competitor: parallel Firecrawl (blog + pricing) + Notion (battlecard) -> Merge -> Code clean+truncate -> Claude Haiku classify -> Code parse+validate.
3. IF priority=HIGH -> Slack approval card (human-in-loop); both branches -> Supabase insert into competitor_signals -> back to loop.
4. After loop: Aggregate -> Code build digest input -> Claude Sonnet synthesize -> Code render Block Kit -> Slack post -> Supabase digest record.
5. n8n Cloud FREE TIER NOTE: this workflow does NOT use $env. Open the 'Config' Set node after import, paste real values into the placeholder fields, save.
name: Scenario A — Weekly Competitive Intel Digest

parameters.content:
## Scenario A — Weekly Competitive Intel Digest

**⚠️ Before first run:** open the **Config** node and replace every `__PLACEHOLDER__` value with a real secret/URL. Free-tier n8n Cloud does not expose `$env`, so all credentials live in this Set node and are referenced downstream via `{{ $('Config').first().json.<key> }}`.

**Required values in Config:** `anthropic_api_key`, `firecrawl_api_key`, `supabase_url`, `supabase_anon_key`, `supabase_service_role_key`, `slack_webhook_competitive_intel`. Optional: `llm_model_classify`, `llm_model_synthesize` (sensible defaults set).

**Flow:** Triggers -> Config -> Set Run config -> SplitInBatches over competitors -> per-competitor parallel scrape (Firecrawl blog + pricing, Supabase battlecard) -> Merge -> clean + truncate -> Haiku classify -> IF HIGH -> Slack approval card -> Supabase insert -> loop. After loop: Aggregate -> Sonnet digest synth -> render Block Kit -> Slack post -> Supabase digest record.

**Battlecards live in `competitor_battlecards` (seeded by `scripts/seed_supabase.py`).** Re-run that script whenever you edit the source markdown in `mock_data/battlecards/`.

**Block Kit fragments:** `n8n/slack_digest_block_kit.json`. Prompts: `prompts/signal_classification.md`, `prompts/digest_synthesis.md`.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "competitor_name": "{{ ($json.digest.high_priority[0] && $json.digest.high_priority[0].competitor_name) || ($json.digest.medium_priority[0] && $json.digest.medium_priority[0].competitor_name) || 'Pigment' }}",
  "signal_type": "news",
  "content_raw": {{ JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify($json.digest)) }},
  "content_summary": {{ JSON.stringify('Weekly digest — ' + ($json.digest.recommended_actions || []).join(' | ')) }},
  "priority_tier": "LOW",
  "confidence_score": {{ $json.overall_confidence }},
  "source_url": null,
  "scraped_at": "{{ $('Set — Run config').first().json.generated_at }}",
  "human_approved": true,
  "run_id": "{{ $('Set — Run config').first().json.run_id }}"
}
